chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-698 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 13-10-2025 Mr. Abdul Salam Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Learned Additional A.G files statements of respondents No.4&5, taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for the petitioner, who after going through the same, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that for redressal of his grievance, the petitioner will exhaust alternate remedy, available under the law. Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
